title: Phase 5 Routing Ledger Demotion
objective: Normalize the old Phase 5 next-task routing handoff so it no longer presents itself as an active operator queue after standalone repo cutover and instead acts as historical packet-routing provenance with explicit redirects to the current status and closeout surfaces.
dependency_note: After Packet 105 normalized the developer-host cutover planning stack, the strongest remaining current-looking residue was the old Phase 5 next-task routing handoff. It already carried a post-cutover interpretation note, but its title, status line, and live `Current Routing Decision` heading still made it read like the current operator queue.
execution_scope: Retitle the old Phase 5 routing handoff as historical provenance.
Replace the live-active status wording with a historical routing-ledger marker.
Add explicit current-routing redirects and relabel the live-queue heading as a historical ledger heading.
forbidden_scope: broad packet-history rewriting beyond top-of-file demotion and heading normalization
success_criteria: The old Phase 5 routing handoff now reads as historical packet-routing provenance instead of a live current queue.
The file explicitly routes current readers to `PROJECT_STATUS.md` and the closeout inventory.
Repo-owned status routing records the closure and advances the next lane toward remaining packet-history registers and legacy routing surfaces.
validation_commands: Select-String -Path ops/agents/handoffs/2026-05-03-olares-phase-5-next-task-and-prompt-routing-handoff.md -Pattern '^# Historical Olares Phase 5 Next Task And Prompt Routing Handoff$','^Status: Historical packet-routing ledger with post-cutover interpretation$','^Current routing:$','^## Historical Routing Ledger$'
next_action: Return repo-foundation routing to the remaining historical handoff registers and packet-history index surfaces that still look current at the top of the file.
